items.title: Graeme Souness in furious on-air clash over Kobbie Mainoo as he claims Man Utd star ‘doesn’t know his own position’
items.summary: GRAEME SOUNESS has defended Thomas Tuchel's decision not to turn to Kobbie Mainoo during the World Cup. And the Scot, 73, reckons that Mainoo "doesn't know" the midfield position. items.title: Humphries targeting 'dream draw' of beating Littler in Matchplay final
items.summary: Luke Humphries says that he wants to face Luke Littler in the final of the World Matchplay Darts as a win over his rival would put the "sparkle on top" of what would be a major win.

items.title: Leeds sign £34.1m defender Muharemovic

items.title: Iheanacho rejects new Celtic deal for Turkey's second tier
items.summary: Nigeria striker Kelechi Iheanacho turns down a new contract with Celtic and joins Bursaspor, who have just been promoted to Turkey's second tier.

items.title: England DELAYED en route to World Cup third-place playoff due to thunderstorms and lightning
items.summary: ENGLAND have been hit by the weather again ahead of tomorrow’s World Cup third-place play-off against France.
